title: Date Picker for "Set a Reminder" - Activities/Updates

posts.author: cmak (Clara Mak)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want the “Set a Reminder” dropdown menu to give me more than just 5 very limited options. This goes for both Activities and Updates. Could we get a date picker please?

Bonus points if we can assign specific members, besides ourselves, to get these activity/update reminders. (Often times, assistants or coordinators are typing up the updates, but it’s our managers that actually need to receive the reminder.)
